name: Ken | The Hero(ine)
description:
Non-stop Ntr November Day 7

Netori?

Truly is the end of all time. Anyway time to start working on the next series. Can't believe it only took me 180+ bots to make a girl(?) that doesn't have melons for breasts

You can check out my other bots if you want to, have fun chatting.

Reviews/Feedbacks are greatly appreciated for future bots.

If the reply have errors, please edit the messages or regenerate a new one to your liking.
